links.label: Extended synthetic documentation label for bounded link-text validation without a real destination

evidence.title: Deterministic ordering inspection for repeated synthetic labels
evidence.method: Sort normalized fixture identifiers with the repository ASCII comparator.
evidence.result: The expected fixture identifiers retain an explicit deterministic order.
evidence.limitations: The result does not measure browser, user, or runtime performance.

evidence.title: Synthetic boundary documentation artifact
evidence.summary: Records long valid strings, arrays, code-shaped text, and table-shaped Markdown for schema stress coverage.

process.title: Normalize the extended fictional record
process.summary: Collect the declared long labels and arrays without adding inferred values.

process.title: Sort with explicit stable tie-breakers
process.summary: Apply documented lifecycle, date, title, and identifier comparisons.

process.title: Preserve the limitation statement
process.summary: Keep fixture-only scope visible beside every structural assertion.

limitations.summary: All extended content is synthetic and validates structure only; it proves no real editorial, runtime, or accessibility outcome.
limitations.impact: The record cannot be used as portfolio evidence.
limitations.mitigation: Keep the fixture private, noindex, and excluded from production helpers.

provenance.sourceNote: All labels and evidence descriptions were authored for this fixture.
provenance.rightsNote: No third-party or production material is present.
provenance.redactionNote: No private path, repository, host, credential, or identifier is present.
